description: Adds Aspire orchestration to an existing repository for inner-loop development and optional Azure deployment readiness. Use when asked to "aspirerify a project", "add Aspire to a solution", "integrate Aspire", "set up an AppHost", "add aspire init", or "orchestrate services with Aspire". Handles CLI setup, TFM compatibility gating, inter-service communication mapping, and delegates AppHost wiring to the Aspire CLI agent skills.
